summary: Failed: The hosting-side failure is most likely due to the production frontend rendering a stale or misconfigured header navigation: the tournaments entry is either omitted from the active nav config, hidden by a feature flag/locale condition, or not included in the deployed build. The page still shows tournament-related content in the body, but the main navigation component on the hosted site does not expose a primary "Tournaments" link, which is why the test fails. Underlying error: TEST FAIL…
